title: post-merge-smoke-v1
description: Post-merge smoke artifact produced by .github/workflows/post-merge-smoke.yml. See state/quality/e2e/README.md for context.

run_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the run.

head_sha.description: Git SHA of the merge commit being smoke-tested. Empty string allowed for local runs without git.

all_passed.description: True iff every check has ok=true.

tunnel_down.description: True iff >=2 of the URLs were unreachable (treated as transient infrastructure outage, not a regression).

unreachable_count.description: Number of URLs that timed out / connection-refused / DNS-failed.

status.description: HTTP status code, or 0 if the request never completed.

ok.description: True iff status==200 AND size_bytes>0 AND content_marker_found.

size_bytes.description: UTF-8 byte count of the response body.

content_marker.description: Substring asserted in the response body.

unreachable.description: True iff the request never received a status (connection-refused, timeout, DNS failure).
